vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất, bao quát
vocab.example: The penthouse balcony provided an uninterrupted perspective of the city's architectural marvels.

vocab.meaning: vẻ hùng vĩ hiểm trở, gai góc
vocab.example: I was struck by the rugged grandeur of the cliffs as they rose sharply from the churning Atlantic Ocean.

vocab.meaning: nằm gọn ghẽ, nép mình (thường nói về ngôi làng hoặc thung lũng)
vocab.example: From the ridge, we could see a tiny hamlet nestle deep within the emerald valley.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi màu sắc đa dạng, rực rỡ
vocab.example: The autumn forest was a stunning kaleidoscope of colors, ranging from fiery crimson to burnt orange.

vocab.meaning: ánh sáng lung linh, huyền ảo (như tiên cảnh)
vocab.example: As the moon rose, the snow-capped peaks took on an ethereal glow that felt truly magical.

vocab.meaning: sự tĩnh lặng nguyên vẹn, không bị xáo trộn
vocab.example: The mountain lake reflected the sky with such undisturbed serenity that I was afraid to even speak.

vocab.meaning: nhô ra, chìa ra (vách đá hoặc mỏm núi)
vocab.example: We stood on a narrow ledge that seemed to jut out into the clouds, offering a thrilling view of the abyss.

vocab.meaning: một dải trải dài lấp lánh (thường nói về mặt nước)
vocab.example: The Mediterranean Sea appeared as a vast, shimmering expanse of silver under the midday sun.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác (cảnh đẹp mãn nhãn)
vocab.example: The climb was grueling, but the summit provided a visual feast that compensated for every drop of sweat.

vocab.meaning: ngắm nhìn, chiêm ngưỡng (thường dùng cho cảnh tượng trang trọng)
vocab.example: It was a moment of pure awe to behold the Northern Lights dancing across the Arctic sky.
